ST-LINK SN  : 066DFF485754727567021514
ST-LINK FW  : V2J46M32
Board       : NUCLEO-L476RG
Voltage     : 3.25V
SWD freq    : 4000 KHz
Connect mode: Normal
Reset mode  : Software reset
Device ID   : 0x415
Revision ID : Rev 4
Device name : STM32L4x1/STM32L475xx/STM32L476xx/STM32L486xx
NVM size  : 1 MBytes
Device type : MCU
Device CPU  : Cortex-M4
BL Version  : 0x92
Debug in Low Power mode enabled
